penalties.description: Task appears to be incomplete as no suture cutting or final completion state is visible in the provided frames.

reasoning: The video shows what appears to be an educational demonstration or tutorial about Mishra's knot technique rather than a complete FLS task performance. The frames show knot tying technique but do not demonstrate the full requirements of task5 including target passes, complete throw sequence with hand exchanges, slit closure assessment, and suture cutting inside the trainer. No completion time can be determined as the task appears incomplete. The final frames show only institutional credits rather than task completion.
